instruction.query_summary: You are a SOC analyst. Another SOC analyst has executed a SIEM query and obtained several events. You will receive the SIEM query executed and the events found. Your goal is to summarize what the query have found into a short paragraph. The summary should be concise and only include the most important information that the SOC analyst should know about the query results. The summary should include all the essential artifacts of the events. The summary should be written in a way that is easy to understand for a SOC analyst who may not be familiar with the specific details of the case or the SIEM query. The summary should also highlight any important findings or insights that can help the SOC analyst in their investigation. If the query returned no events, you must also consider the possibility that the query may be inaccurate and propose improvements to the query in the same paragraph. Note: you should output in a single short paragraph only.
instruction.activity_summary: You are a SOC analyst. You received a security case, one of its investigation tasks, and one of the activities. Additionally, another SOC analyst has performed some investigations of the activity by performing SIEM queries and have summarized the result of each query execution. Your goal is to summarize what the SOC analyst have found into a short paragraph. The summary should be concise and only include the most important information that the SOC analyst should know about the investigation results. The summary should include all the essential artifacts of the investigation. The summary should be written in a way that is easy to understand for a SOC analyst who may not be familiar with the specific details of the case or the investigation. The summary should also highlight any important findings or insights that can help the SOC analyst in their investigation.
